name: cluster-container
role: Horizontal flex row with wrapping. The foundational primitive for nav link rows, button groups, tag clouds, action bars, breadcrumb trails — any 'inline group of related items that may overflow to a second line'.

gap.note: xs=--space-1, sm=--space-2 (default — fits buttons + tags), md=--space-3, lg=--space-card.

align.note: Cross-axis (vertical) alignment. Default 'center' matches the common case (mixed-height items aligned to optical center).

wrap.note: Whether children wrap to a second line when the row overflows. 'nowrap' should be used sparingly — it sacrifices responsiveness.

ariaPatterns.noLandmark: cluster-container is structural. When the cluster represents a related group of controls, wrap it in <div role='group' aria-label='Form actions'> (operator adds the role; the primitive does not).
ariaPatterns.navCluster: When the cluster is a nav link row, wrap it in <nav aria-label='Primary'>; the cluster itself stays role-less.

compositionExamples: As article-meta inline meta items: <article-meta><prim-cluster data-gap='md'>author · date · reading-time</prim-cluster></article-meta>
